name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter
material: a small feather and a bit of sugar
description: One creature of your choice that you can see within range perceives everything as hilariously funny and falls into fits of laughter if this spell affects it. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Incapacitated and Prone conditions for the duration. A creature with an Intelligence score of 4 or less isn't affected. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make another Wisdom saving throw. On a success, the spell ends.
